svg.title: SVG generation flow
svg.desc: This flowchart explains the required authoring process for future visual explanations. The agent first confirms that the change affects architecture, workflow, data flow, or process. The agent searches existing docs and history, writes Mermaid source outside the repository, renders an SVG with mmdc, inspects the rendered result, revises unclear diagrams, places the final SVG under visual-explanations, writes a verbose description, and commits only the SVG file.
